label: Funeral of an Adult
intro:
Brethren, let us join together in praying to the Lord God,
not only for our departed {{brother_sister}},
but also for the Church, for the peace of the world,
and for our salvation.
petitions:
For all the shepherds of the Church,
that they may fulfill the words they preach,
let us pray to the Lord.

For all those in public office,
that they may promote justice and peace,
let us pray to the Lord.

For all those who bear the cross of pain in mind or body
that they may never feel forsaken by God,
let us pray to the Lord.

That God in his mercy may blot out all {{his}} sins,
let us pray to the Lord.

That God may establish {{him}} in the realm of peace and light,
let us pray to the Lord.

That God may grant {{him}} blessedness
and communion with the saints and the elect,
let us pray to the Lord.

For our deceased relatives, friends, and benefactors,
that God may admit them into the light of his splendour,
let us pray to the Lord.

For all the faithful departed,
that God may gather them into the kingdom of heaven,
let us pray to the Lord.
closing:
O God,
Creator and Redeemer of all the faithful,
grant to the souls of your servants
the remission of all their sins;
that through our faithful supplications
they may obtain the pardon they have always desired.
Through Christ our Lord.

label: Funeral of a Baptized Child
intro:
Jesus is the Son of God and the pattern of our own creation.
His promise is that one day we shall truly be like him.
With our hope founded on that promise, we pray:
petitions:
That God will bring to completion {{name}}’s Baptism into Christ,
let us pray to the Lord.

That God will lead {{name}} from death to life,
let us pray to the Lord.

That all of us, {{name}}’s family and friends,
may be comforted in our grief,
let us pray to the Lord.

That God will grant release to those who suffer,
let us pray to the Lord.

That God will grant peace to all who have died
in the faith of Christ,
let us pray to the Lord.
closing:
Grant, we beseech you, O Lord,
through the intercession of Mary, the Mother of God,
that she who stood by her Son dying upon the cross,
may assist us who mourn,
and bestow upon us the consolation and reward of her faith.
Through Christ our Lord.

label: Funeral of an Unbaptized Child
intro:
Christ has promised that we shall receive
whatever we ask in his name.
Let us ask our Father in Christ’s name
to help us in our time of sorrow.
petitions:
For {{name}},
that {{he}} be held securely in God’s loving embrace
now and for all eternity,
let us pray to the Lord.

For {{name}}’s family, especially {{his}} mother and father,
[{{his}} brother(s) and sister(s)],
that they experience the healing power of Christ
in the midst of their pain and grief,
let us pray to the Lord.

For {{name}}’s friends
and those who cared for {{him}},
that they be consoled in their loss
and strengthened in their love for one another,
let us pray to the Lord.

For the whole Church,
that we may prepare worthily for the hour of our death,
when God will call us by name to pass from this world to the next,
let us pray to the Lord.

For all the faithful departed,
that they be admitted into the joys of eternal life,
let us pray to the Lord.
closing:
Grant, we beseech you, O Lord,
through the intercession of Mary, the Mother of God,
that she who stood by her Son dying upon the cross,
may assist us who mourn,
and bestow upon us the consolation and reward of her faith.
Through Christ our Lord.
